free_text: Measurement and analysis of the Na-23(n,X-gamma)
reaction cross section for neutron energies
between 0.2 and 20 MeV.
Oak Ridge electron linear accelerator
Electrons on tantalum
Sodium in stainless steel container, 30-cm high by
30-cm wide, thickness of 0.0253 atoms/barn.
12.5-cm by 12.5-cm heavily shielded NaI
detector, 125-degrees from beam axis.
Thick organic scintillators used in neutron flux
measurement. Plastic scintillator on edge of beam used
to monitor flux during gamma measurements.
Flight path of 47.35-meters. Sample placed at
45-degree angle to beam. Neutron flux determined in
a separate measurement. Background measured with no
sample or sample can in beam.
Corrections made for self-absorption and neutron self
shielding.
Quoted errors do not include:
overall normalization uncertainty of 10%
Tables in ORNL-TM-6281, pp.41-65
Reference corrected.
OS. STATUS, ERR-ANALYS updated, converted
to lower case, minor BIB changes
